query: Can you generate a one-week travel itinerary for a group of 3 from Newark to Florida covering 3 cities from March 18th to March 24th, 2022? Our budget is $10,400. We require accommodations that are entire rooms. Although we won't be self-driving, we'd prefer locations that allow parties.

plan.attraction: Jungle Island; Pérez Art Museum Miami; Bayfront Park;
plan.lunch: Shorts Burger and Shine; AB's Absolute Barbecues;
plan.dinner: Papouli's Mediterranean Cafe & Market; Spice It - Hotel IBIS;

plan.attraction: Wynwood Walls; Maurice A. Ferré Park; Miami Seaquarium;
plan.lunch: Tako Cheena by Pom Pom; Anjlika;
plan.dinner: Bayside Marketplace; Skyviews Miami Observation Wheel;

plan.transportation: Self-driving, Miami to Punta Gorda, 2 hours 41 mins
plan.attraction: Charlotte Harbor Preserve State Park; Peace River Wildlife Center; Punta Gorda Nature Park;
plan.dinner: Urban Cuisine; Hide Out The Street Cafe;

plan.attraction: Charlotte Harbor Environmental Center; Peace River Botanical & Sculpture Gardens; Military Heritage Museum;
plan.dinner: Punta Gorda History Center; King Fisher Fleet;

plan.transportation: Self-driving, Punta Gorda to Jacksonville, 4 hours 26 mins
plan.attraction: Jacksonville Zoo and Gardens; MOSH (Museum Of Science & History); Fort George Island Cultural State Park;
plan.lunch: Goose Feathers Cafe and Bakery; The Spice Room;
plan.dinner: Catty Shack Ranch Wildlife Sanctuary; MOCA (Museum Of Contemporary Art), Jacksonville;

plan.attraction: Tree Hill Nature Center; Timucuan Ecological and Historical Preserve; Walter Jones Historic Park;
plan.lunch: Dosa Junction; Guru Kripa Chicken Corner;
plan.dinner: Museum of Southern History; Beaches Museum;

plan.breakfast: Bravo Diet Food and Nutrition; OCD - Online Cake Delivery;
